shell.superAdminBanner: Super admin — active tenant context for APIs and screens.

insights.title: Operational insights
insights.first: {count, plural, =0 {All patients are on track.} =1 {1 patient idle for over 48 h — check the queue.} other {{count} patients idle for over 48 h — prioritize the longest pending.}}
insights.second: {count, plural, =0 {No stage transitions today.} =1 {1 stage transition today.} other {{count} stage transitions today — good flow.}}
insights.third: {percent}% of patients had stage changes in the last 7 days.

pipeline.pipelineDescription: Each column is an active pathway stage: who is where, deadlines and alerts.
pipeline.noPublishedPathway: Publish a pathway version in Settings or Pathways to see the board.

alerts.title: Active alerts
alerts.description: Patients past the critical SLA threshold in this pathway.

column.loadMoreDisabledWithStatus: Clear the status filter to load more (pagination is server-wide for this view).

drag.hint: Drag a card to another column to change stage.
drag.daysInStage: {count, plural, =0 {since today in this stage} one {# day in this stage} other {# days in this stage}}
drag.disabledWithStatus: Clear the status filter to move cards between columns.

newPatient.title: New patient
newPatient.description: Register the patient and start a published pathway.

changeStage.title: Change stage
changeStage.description: Move this patient to another stage in the same published pathway.
changeStage.sameStage: Choose a different stage than the current one.
changeStage.noOtherStages: There are no other stages to move to in this pathway.
changeStage.completeConfirmDescription: The patient will be removed from the active board. Stage history and documents are preserved and a new journey can be started later.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Consolidated tenant view with period, pathway, OPME filters and CSV export.
reports.empty: No data found for the current filters.

charts.byStageDescription: Current distribution by stage within the filtered scope.
charts.byStatusDescription: Comparison between on track, warning and critical.
charts.byPathwayDescription: Volume by active flow in the current scope.
charts.byOpmeDescription: Distribution by supplier linked to the patient.

reports.criticalDescription: Patients above critical SLA within the current scope.
